# qte77.github.io

> Account blog — notes on AI agents, ML, evaluation, GitHub Actions, and lab automation. Companion to the qte77 framework and 30+ repos.

## About

- [About](https://github.com/qte77/qte77.github.io/blob/master/_pages/about.md): owner, ecosystem map, topics
- [README](https://github.com/qte77/qte77.github.io/blob/master/README.md): repo metadata, theme attribution

## Featured posts

- [A $150 Pipetting Robot from a Stock 3D Printer](https://github.com/qte77/qte77.github.io/blob/master/_posts/2026-06-01-pipettebot-sub-150-pipetting-robot.md): cheap lab automation via Anycubic i3 + DLAB dPette+, PC-as-host, Apache-2.0
- [GraphJudge — Measuring How Agents Collaborate](https://github.com/qte77/qte77.github.io/blob/master/_posts/2026-01-15-agentx-agentbeats-writeup.md): AgentBeats competition entry, graph-based MAS coordination assessment
- [AI Agents-eval — Comprehensive Analysis](https://github.com/qte77/qte77.github.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-08-09-ai-agents-eval-comprehensive-analysis.md): research MAS evaluation framework on PeerRead
- [AI Agents-eval — Papers Meta Review](https://github.com/qte77/qte77.github.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-08-09-ai-agents-eval-papers-meta-review.md): meta-review across 50+ agent evaluation papers
- [AI Agents-eval — Enhancement Recommendations](https://github.com/qte77/qte77.github.io/blob/master/_posts/2025-08-09-ai-agents-eval-enhancement-recommendations.md): forward-looking improvements
